H
table.html
<table role="presentation" width="100%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
  <tr>
    <td><table role="presentation" class="sd-mobile-full-width" width="320" align="left" style="width:320px;float:left;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tr>
          <td><!-- Column 1 content --></td>
        </tr>
      </table>
      
      <!--[if mso]>
          </td>
          <td valign="top">
      <![endif]-->
      
      <table role="presentation" class="sd-mobile-full-width" width="10" align="left" style="width:10px;float:left;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tr>
          <td style="font-size:1px; line-height: 1px; height: 10px;" height="10">&nbsp;</td>
        </tr>
      </table>
      
      <!--[if mso]>
          </td>
          <td valign="top">
      <![endif]--> 
      
      <table role="presentation" class="sd-mobile-full-width" width="320" align="right" style="width:320px;float:right;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tr>
          <td><!-- Column 2 content --></td>
        </tr>
      </table></td>
  </tr>
</table>
